prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 2Y-KBPN-TU3O Product Type: BICYCLE_LIGHT Brand (from catalog): Universal Safety Existing Title: 7 Function 5 LED Universal Bicycle Safety Flasher Bike Attachment Included Description: Ever find yourself riding your bike at night and worrying about your visibility? This ASR Outdoor 5 LED Safety Flasher will ensure that you'll be seen by other bikers and vehicles.

This flasher features 5 super bright LED bulbs, and has 7 functions so you can customize your visibility based on the time of day or night. It even has a water resistant design so you won’t have to worry about it shorting out in a downpour.

Each Flasher comes with an arm strap and bicycle attachment as well as a clip on the back. It requires (2) AA batteries (not included). Compact and lightweight, these flashers are ideal for joggers, cyclists, skiers, hikers and even kids! Make sure to keep one of these on your bike at all times.

Colors available: Red, Green, Blue, Yellow or White

Functions:

All LEDs On

All LEDs Flashing Fast

All LEDs Flashing Slow

LEDs Flashing in a Pattern from Left to Right

LEDs Flashing in a Pattern from Right to Left LEDs Flashing Fast in a Pattern from Left to Right

LEDs Flashing in a Pattern from Left to Right then Right to Left

All LEDs Off

Search Terms: bike Features: - Super Bright 5 LED Bulb Emits Powerful Beam - Water Resistant Design | Compact & Lightweight - Dimensions: 2” x 2¾” | Brightness: 2,500 MCD - Arm Strap & Bicycle Attachment - Ideal for Joggers, Cyclists, Skiers, Hikers, Kids, Halloween and Much More! === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
